question: Does the image display a vertical layout with three distinct sections: a pie chart at the top, a combination chart in the middle, and a data table at the bottom?
Is the pie chart at the top divided into exactly 6 sectors?
Are the pie chart sectors labeled with the specific product names and percentages: Electronics 35%, Clothing 22%, Food 18%, Home Goods 12%, Beauty 8%, Other 5%?
Do the pie chart sectors visually follow the correct descending order of size: Electronics > Clothing > Food > Home Goods > Beauty > Other?
Are the pie chart sectors distinguished by different colors?
Does the middle chart feature a dual Y-axis structure (axes on both the left and right sides)?
Does the middle chart contain both vertical bars (representing annual sales) and a trend line (representing profit margin)?
Does the X-axis of the middle chart represent the years from 2020 to 2025 (displaying 6 distinct time points)?
Is the bar chart visually associated with the left Y-axis (Sales) and the line chart with the right Y-axis (Profit Margin)?
Is the table at the bottom structured with exactly 5 rows and 6 columns?
Does the table feature a header row that is visually distinguished by dark shading?
